696             order by start_time desc

702             starttime as start_time,
703             type,
704             query_text,
705             userid
706         from (

711                 type,
712                 userid,
713                 LISTAGG(case
714                     when LEN(RTRIM(text)) = 0 then text
715                     else RTRIM(text)
716                 end,
717                 '') within group (
718                     order by sequence
719                 ) as query_text

726                 AND sequence < {_QUERY_SEQUENCE_LIMIT}

729                 pid,

731                 type,
732                 userid
733             order by
734                 starttime,

736                 xid,
737                 type,
738                 userid
739                 asc
740         )
741         where
742             type in ('DDL', 'QUERY')
743     )
744     where
745         (create_command ilike 'create temp table %'
746             or create_command ilike 'create temporary table %'
747             -- we want to get all the create table statements and not just temp tables if non temp table is created and dropped in the same transaction
748             or create_command ilike 'create table %')
749         -- Redshift creates temp tables with the following names: volt_tt_%. We need to filter them out.

740         -- Optional and additional hash to be used for query deduplication and final query identity
741         CASE 
742             WHEN CONTAINS(query_history.query_text, '-- Hex query metadata:')
743             -- Extract project id and hash it
744             THEN CAST(HASH(
745                 REGEXP_SUBSTR(query_history.query_text, '"project_id"\\\\s*:\\\\s*"([^"]+)"', 1, 1, 'e', 1),
746                 REGEXP_SUBSTR(query_history.query_text, '"context"\\\\s*:\\\\s*"([^"]+)"', 1, 1, 'e', 1)
747             ) AS VARCHAR)
748             ELSE NULL 
749         END as query_secondary_fingerprint
750     FROM
751         snowflake.account_usage.query_history
752     WHERE
753         query_history.start_time >= to_timestamp_ltz({start_time_millis}, 3) -- {start_time.isoformat()}

755         AND execution_status = 'SUCCESS'

766     FROM

769         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bucket_start_time, query_fingerprint, query_secondary_fingerprint ORDER BY start_time DESC) = 1
